prompt: Luxury natural skincare ad campaign shot in a sun-dappled forest clearing, styled like a premium editorial beauty poster for WILLOW & ROOT. Center a beautiful young woman with sun-kissed skin and loose blonde hair in a thick side braid, wearing a soft beige spaghetti-strap slip dress, seated behind a rustic moss-covered log table, holding delicate white wildflowers near her face. Her face is obscured by a clean rectangular block in a warm tan tone, creating an anonymous model effect. In the foreground on the log, arrange exactly 5 beauty products in a polished e-commerce lineup from left to right: a green glass dropper bottle labeled organic face oil with bamboo cap, a round cream blush compact with dusty rose lid, a tinted lip balm stick in muted terracotta packaging, a frosted pale-green pump bottle labeled dewy serum with bamboo pump, and a closed bamboo compact engraved with the brand name. Add soft white wildflowers and lush green foliage around the products and edges of the frame. Use warm golden-hour backlighting, creamy bokeh, shallow depth of field, soft lens glow, natural green and beige palette, high-end botanical wellness aesthetic, photorealistic skin and packaging, centered composition, vertical 4:5 layout. Overlay elegant dark serif typography at the top with the headline Rooted in Radiance on two lines, a smaller sans-serif tagline beneath reading Nature-Powered. Skin-Loving., separated by a small leaf icon and thin horizontal divider lines. Add 2 circular promotional badges: on the upper left, an olive-green badge with a leaf icon and the text PLANT-BASED + CRUELTY FREE; on the upper right, a beige badge with the text 15% OFF FIRST ORDER. Place a small white Pollo.ai watermark in the top-right corner. Premium beauty advertising, clean luxury composition, modern mobile-first e-commerce campaign.
